summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of SoccerMatch platform. All major features tested for 3 user types (Player, Club, Admin). Backend APIs achieved 100% success rate (19/19 tests). Frontend user flows working correctly with successful registration, login, profile management, and cross-user interactions (player applications to club opportunities).

design_issues.issue: Empty state handling may need improvement when no approved players exist

passed_tests: Admin login with provided credentials (100% success)
Player profile creation and updates (all fields working)
Player browsing and applying to opportunities (integration working)
Admin dashboard stats and management (100% success)
All 19 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Cross-user integration (player successfully applied to club opportunity)
UI navigation and form interactions (100% success)
Responsive design (tested desktop, tablet, mobile viewports)
